seed.label: New to diagrams & evidence?
seed.sublabel: Ask Seentrix AI which architecture and data-flow diagrams the CRA expects in your Annex VII technical file — and what counts as test-report evidence.

diagrams.title: Diagrams
diagrams.subtitle: Architecture, data-flow, environment, threat-model and hardware-layout drawings for your Annex VII technical file.
diagrams.emptyDescription: Create your first architecture or data-flow diagram. Annex VII 2(a) expects a description of the product's design, development and data flows.
diagrams.deleteDescription: This permanently deletes the diagram and its saved drawing. This action cannot be undone.
diagrams.archiveSubtitle: Previous versions of each diagram. Only the diagrams above are valid — restoring a version makes it the valid one again.

editor.titleRequired: Please enter a title before saving.

errors.sceneTooLarge: This drawing is too large to save (10 MB max).
errors.previewTooLarge: The preview image is too large.
errors.uploadFailed: Saving the drawing failed. Please try again.
errors.notAuthorized: You don't have permission to edit diagrams.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.typeExists: A diagram of this type already exists — open it to update it.

evidence.title: Evidence
evidence.subtitle: Test reports, penetration tests, code analysis and other evidence that backs your Annex VII technical file.
evidence.emptyDescription: Upload test reports, penetration-test results or code-analysis output. Annex VII point 6 requires reports of the security tests carried out.
evidence.addDescription: Upload a file, give it a title, and tag it with a category and the Annex VII point it supports.
evidence.dropzoneHint: PDF, image, document, CSV or zip. Max 25 MB.
evidence.deleteDescription: This permanently deletes the evidence file. This action cannot be undone.

errors.fileTooLarge: That file is too large (25 MB max).
errors.uploadFailed: The upload failed. Please try again.
errors.notAuthorized: You don't have permission to add evidence.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
